verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear our cry, be lifted high in this place Lord we want you no one else will do in this place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Chains are broken, eyes open miracles are in this place Hearts are mended, grace extended miracles are in this place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A miracle can happen, a miracle can happen, a miracle can happen in this place. x3

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: With Jesus it will happen, With Jesus it will happen, With Jesus it will happen in this place. x3
